moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The climax of the 2026 FIFA World Cup sees Spain take on Argentina in the final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Spain face Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final on Sunday. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Missed England
angles.copy: No England in the final, but the World Cup drama continues! Spain vs Argentina for the ultimate prize this Sunday. Will Messi lift it again?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Bronze Final
moments.blurb: The third-place playoff of the FIFA World Cup 2026 takes place on Saturday, following the semi-final defeats for France and England.

angles.name: Third Place Battle
angles.copy: Still got World Cup fever? The Bronze Final is on Saturday! Who will take third place after a thrilling tournament?

angles.name: England's Last Stand (Almost)
angles.copy: After a tough semi-final, England will be watching the Bronze Final on Saturday. A chance for some pride, even if it's not the big one.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is set for its 17th week at UK Number 1, becoming the longest-running British single to top the charts.

angles.name: Chart Record Breaker
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running British Number 1 single ever. Incredible stuff!

angles.name: 17 Weeks At The Top
angles.copy: SEVENTEEN WEEKS! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are dominating the UK charts with 'Rein Me In'. Is it still on your playlist?

moments.title: World Cup fever hits the charts
moments.blurb: Football anthems are climbing the UK Singles Chart, with ANOTR's 'Talk To You' going viral thanks to John Stones and Shakira's 'Dai Dai' also rising.

angles.name: Football Chart Climbers
angles.copy: It's coming home (to the charts)! World Cup fever has sent ANOTR, Shakira & Burna Boy, and even Oasis' 'Wonderwall' flying up the Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: Stones Dance Track
angles.copy: That John Stones viral dance has done it! ANOTR's 'Talk To You' is soaring up the charts thanks to the England defender's moves. Are you streaming it?

moments.title: Somerset House Summer Series kicks off
moments.blurb: The American Express presents Somerset House Summer Series returns to London's iconic courtyard for eleven nights of live music, running from July 16-26.

angles.name: Summer Gigs in London
angles.copy: London's iconic Somerset House Summer Series is back! Eleven nights of incredible live music starting today in a stunning setting. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Outdoor Music Vibes
angles.copy: Sunshine and live music! The Somerset House Summer Series brings a fantastic lineup of breakthrough and established artists to the capital. Perfect summer vibes.

moments.title: Bruno Mars brings 'The Romantic Tour' to Wembley
moments.blurb: Global superstar Bruno Mars is set to play Wembley Stadium on Sunday, July 19, as part of his 'The Romantic Tour'.

angles.name: Bruno Mars Live
angles.copy: Get ready, 24K Magic is coming to Wembley! Bruno Mars plays the iconic stadium this Sunday. Who's excited for 'The Romantic Tour'?

angles.name: Wembley Weekend
angles.copy: Another huge name at Wembley this weekend! Bruno Mars takes to the stage on Sunday. What's your favourite Bruno Mars track?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: Legendary Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26.

angles.name: Jagger's 83rd
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones on July 26. What's your favourite Stones hit?

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: An absolute rock icon! Mick Jagger turns 83 on the 26th. Celebrate with some classic Rolling Stones all day!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Brian May!
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on Friday, July 19.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: A true legend turns 79 this Friday! Happy birthday to Queen's magnificent guitarist, Brian May. What's your favourite Queen song with his signature solo?

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's very own guitar god, Brian May, on July 19! Time to crank up the anthems!

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, Stewart Copeland!
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and acclaimed composer Stewart Copeland celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 16.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the legendary drummer of The Police, Stewart Copeland, who turns 74 today! What's your top Police track?

angles.name: Rhythm King
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland! Drummer for The Police and a prolific composer. Celebrate with some classic tunes!

moments.title: 'The Dark' thriller on ITV this week
moments.blurb: A new moody thriller, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale and set in the Scottish wilderness, is airing this week on ITV.

angles.name: New ITV Thriller
angles.copy: Looking for a new drama? 'The Dark', a moody thriller set in the beautiful but ominous Scottish wilderness, is on ITV this week. Ready for some suspense?

angles.name: Scottish Drama
angles.copy: Helen Baxendale stars in 'The Dark', a gripping new thriller airing on ITV this week. Perfect for a night in!

moments.title: The Chase Around The World hits ITV1
moments.blurb: Bradley Walsh and The Chasers embark on a global road trip in 'The Chase Around The World', a new six-part series starting today, Thursday July 16, on ITV1.

angles.name: Chasers Go Global
angles.copy: The Chasers are leaving the studio! 'The Chase Around The World' begins tonight on ITV1 with Bradley Walsh. Get ready for a global quiz adventure!

angles.name: New Quiz Show
angles.copy: Tonight! Bradley Walsh and the Chasers take on the world in a brand new six-part series. Tune into 'The Chase Around The World' on ITV1.

moments.title: School's Out for Summer!
moments.blurb: Many schools across England and Wales are breaking up today or this week for the summer holidays, with some already off since early July.

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If your kids are finishing today, enjoy the break! What are your plans for the long summer ahead?

angles.name: School Run Freedom
angles.copy: No more school run for a while! Happy summer holidays to all the parents and kids breaking up this week. Time for some fun in the sun!

moments.title: 'Elle' (Legally Blonde prequel) streaming on Prime Video
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which explores Elle Woods' high school years, premiered on Amazon Prime Video on July 1.

angles.name: Legally Blonde Prequel
angles.copy: If you're a Legally Blonde fan, the prequel series 'Elle' is now streaming on Amazon Prime Video! Get a look at Elle Woods' high school life. Have you watched it yet?

angles.name: Early July Stream
angles.copy: Still catching up on July's new drops? The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' landed on Prime Video earlier this month. Perfect for a summer binge!
